skills.name: bioresearch-introduction
skills.triggers: what can BioResearch Agent do / which workflow to use

skills.name: bioresearch-environment-check
skills.triggers: validate environment / troubleshoot a failed run

skills.name: bioresearch-literature-analysis
skills.triggers: literature review / research-gap analysis / PubMed synthesis

skills.name: bioresearch-biomarker-discovery
skills.triggers: find gene biomarkers / candidates for a disease

skills.name: bioresearch-causal-inference
skills.triggers: causal effect / MR between exposure and outcome

skills.name: bioresearch-disease-case-study
skills.capability: Real-data disease case study + blind benchmark (known-gene recovery / pathway sanity / reproducibility)
skills.triggers: disease case study / validation run / benchmark the workflows on real data

skills.name: bioresearch-causal-evidence
skills.triggers: causal evidence / colocalization / TWAS / fine-mapping / which gene drives a GWAS locus

skills.name: bioresearch-agent-router
skills.capability: Rule-based intent classification -> workflow (literature/biomarker/causal/case-study/doctor); deterministic, no LLM
skills.triggers: classify / route a free-text research intent to the right workflow

skills.name: bioresearch-foundation-embeddings
skills.capability: Single-cell foundation model embeddings (scGPT/UCE/scFoundation) with mock-mode pipeline validation + live mode API stubs
skills.triggers: foundation model / scGPT / UCE / scFoundation / cell embedding / benchmark cell-type recovery

skills.name: bioresearch-ld-reference-management
skills.capability: Ancestry-specific LD reference panel management + greedy LD clumping (PLINK --clump style) + LD score computation
skills.triggers: LD reference / clumping / ancestry-specific LD / LD score / instrument independence

skills.name: bioresearch-gwas-harmonization
skills.capability: Cross-ancestry GWAS summary-statistics harmonization (allele alignment, strand flipping, palindromic removal, AF divergence, signal overlap)
skills.triggers: GWAS harmonization / allele alignment / strand flip / palindromic SNP / cross-ancestry GWAS

skills.name: bioresearch-ancestry-aware-mr
skills.capability: Cross-ancestry MR with CAUSE-like correlated pleiotropy + MRMix-like mixture model + per-ancestry IVW + cross-ancestry meta-analysis + portability assessment
skills.triggers: cross-ancestry MR / CAUSE / MRMix / correlated pleiotropy / portability / ancestry transfer

planned.name: bioresearch-workflow-orchestration
planned.note: No automated orchestrator CLI yet; framework stages 9–12 are conceptual, not implemented.

planned.name: bioresearch-single-cell-analysis
planned.note: Foundation model embeddings skill (bioresearch-foundation-embeddings) now active; full scRNA-seq pipeline pending.
